rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow assigning a staff member to a client or adding them to a campaign.
The system shall allow removing assignments from staff members, returning them to an unassigned state.
The system shall enable staff members to switch between different assignments during their work period.
The system shall mark a staff member as unemployed when they leave the job.
The system shall archive the record of a former employee after some time has passed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A staff member can be assigned to a client or added to a campaign.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'At first, they may not be linked to any client or campaign. Over time, they can be assigned to a client or added to a campaign, depending on the work they are given.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Assignments for staff members can be removed, returning them to an unassigned situation.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'These assignments can also be removed, returning them to an unassigned situation.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Staff members may move in and out of different assignments while working.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'While working, the staff member may move in and out of different assignments as needed.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When a staff member leaves the job, they are no longer employed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'Eventually, when they leave the job, they are no longer employed.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After some time, the record of a former employee is archived.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'After some time, their record is archived and they become a former employee.'
